SEQUENCE.COMMENT: captureSapTid - capture an SAP transaction into this framework transaction log - this service uses a scope to avoid variable name conflicts

MAP.COMMENT: drop output variables before the call, just in case

INVOKE.COMMENT: these two calls wont fail if $tid doesnt exist

MAP.COMMENT: map a logMessage and then append the sap auditLog

Values.value: $tid=%scope1/$tid% sender=%scope1/sender% receiver=%scope1/receiver% msgType=%scope1/msgType% date=%scope1/date% state=%scope1/state% auditLog:
